meanings.definition: look suggestively or obliquely; look or gaze with a sly, immodest, or malign expression
examples: The men leered at the young women on the beach

meanings.definition: showing sly or knowing malice in a glance; - Amy Lowell
examples: she had run in fear of...his evil leering eye

meanings.definition: (of a glance) sidelong and slyly lascivious
